nasb.text: Then he slaughtered the burnt offering; and Aaron’s sons handed the blood to him and he sprinkled it around on the altar.

esv.text: Then he killed the burnt offering, and Aaron’s sons handed him the blood, and he threw it against the sides of the altar.

cnv.text: 亞倫宰殺了燔祭牲，他的兒子把血遞給他，潑在祭壇的周圍。

ccb.text: 亚伦宰了燔祭祭牲，他儿子们把祭牲的血递给他洒在祭坛四周。
